title: betula × jackii
intro: Betula × jackii, also known as the Jack's birch or hybrid silver birch, is a deciduous tree or shrub that is a natural hybrid of the paper birch (Betula papyrifera) and the silver birch (Betula pendula). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Betula × jackii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe skin irritations, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various ailments.
